_comment: Trading rules for kalshi_trader.py. Adjust thresholds to your risk tolerance.

rules.name: strong_divergence_buy
rules.description: Buy YES on Claude's pick when divergence >= 15% and market price <= 0.70

rules.name: extreme_divergence_buy
rules.description: Buy YES on Claude's pick when divergence >= 25% and market price <= 0.60

rules.name: chalk_fade
rules.description: Buy NO on heavy chalk (>90%) when Claude has it < 80%
